name: hud_ui_panel_copy_construct_core
description: HudUiPanel::CopyConstructCore copies the text-label base, installs the panel ftable, clears textPick, clones colors/font/cached text, and copies text metrics, wrapping, alignment, and shadow fields.
known_limits: Depends on HudUiTextLabel::CopyConstructor and HudUiElement::CopyConstructor, which are functionally accepted but still carry isolated byte-shape drift.

VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?CopyConstructCore@HudUiPanel@@QAEPAU1@PBU1@@Z at 0x4ba850 still fails: 532 unmasked mismatches, 97 relocation bytes masked, 7 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 390 bytes and the VC object symbol is 656 bytes. The isolated manifest emits substantially different EH/helper shape around the font clone and field-copy sequence.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows HudUiTextLabel::CopyConstructor, g_HudUiPanel_FTable install, textPick clear, color copies, font clone through GetObjectA/CreateFontIndirectA, cached text strncpy, and copies of text metrics, wrap/text rects, alignment, and shadow offsets.
The native panel smoke validates ftable identity, textPick clearing, cloned font handle, cached text, color/font/text metric fields, wrap/text rects, align mode, and shadow offsets.
